description_long: This is a tall, freestanding blue wooden bookshelf with classical decorative accents and metallic trim. The front features three open shelves filled with a variety of books, some stacked upright and others lying flat, as well as a small decorative item. The back panel of the shelving area has a patterned design, adding visual interest. Below the shelves, there is a two-door cabinet with simple handles, providing enclosed storage space. The sides are solid and unadorned, while the top and base are robust and slightly protrude, giving the piece a sturdy, traditional appearance. The overall finish is smooth with a matte sheen, and the structure is supported by two prominent front columns.
description: A tall, blue wooden bookshelf with three open shelves filled with books and a lower two-door cabinet, featuring classical decorative accents and metallic trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves with books, a patterned back panel, and a two-door cabinet at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the bookshelf, the solid blue panel, and the protruding top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid blue back panel with no visible openings or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the bookshelf's depth and structural columns.
